title: Emailing boards using the long email address
excerpt: When creating items by email using the long email address why can’t Monday make the people column as the person who sent the email if they are a Monday.com member instead of the person who copied the email address and se…

posts.author: GuyWates (Guy Wates)
posts.cookedHtml: When creating items by email using the long email address why can’t Monday make the people column as the person who sent the email if they are a Monday.com member instead of the person who copied the email address and sent it to the user to use, surely this cannot be too difficult to develop?
